content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule is transforming into the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule, and once the transformation is completed, his strength will skyrocket in terror.

At that time, he would even be sure that he would not be defeated in a battle with a real ordinary Ultimate Ancient Demon.

Even, many replica bodies can be used together to besiege and kill an ultimate ancient demon.

Soon.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule had finally transformed into the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules, and his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules realm had also transformed into the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules Domain.

And this transformation directly triggered the transformation of the whole body, and the aura on his body was much stronger than in the past.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength has reached the true limit of the peak ancient demon level, and it is already extremely difficult to continue to improve.

"Maybe it's time to break through to become the ultimate ancient demon!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He wasn't ready to break through in the Abyss of Aromu, it wouldn't be good if there was an ultimate ancient demon interference.

He is going to open a dojo in the endless space-time line, where he will make a breakthrough without anyone interfering.

......

In the depths of the endless spaceline.

Ye Tian opened up an ordinary dojo here in 28, and protected this place with the power of the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, so that this place would not be swallowed up by the endless space-time line.

After that, he began to prepare for a breakthrough.

To break through from the peak ancient demon level realm to the ultimate ancient demon realm, the most important thing is to make the peak ancient demon body transform into the ultimate ancient demon body, and the body transformation is the real breakthrough.

And the probability of a normal peak ancient demon-level powerhouse breaking through is too low, and Ye Tian's foundation is too sufficient, and his chance of breaking through is very high.

Perhaps in this era, from ancient times to the present, no one has such a foundation as him.

Therefore, when he hit the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm, he didn't need to use the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space at all.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he used the power of the ultimate rule of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao to begin to transform the body of the peak ancient demon level.

Bang!!!!

The ultimate particles of the whole body disintegrated, and then began to rapidly combine and evolve towards the ultimate ancient demon body.

It all went smoothly and without any hindrance.

After a long time, Ye Tian's physical body was about to begin to transform and complete.

Meanwhile.

His body frantically absorbs the energy of space-time particles from the outside world, turning the space-time particle energy into his own energy.

Gradually, his body began to form a space-time storm, and even his dojo was torn apart, and his body floated on the endless space-time line.

All the power is in his body!

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian gradually opened his eyes, and he felt that his transformation was too great, far beyond his past physical body.

The physical body of an ordinary Ultimate Ancient Demon could not be compared to him at all.

Since he comprehended the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao when he was at the peak of the Ancient Demon Level, as soon as he broke through the Dao Ultimate Ancient Demon Level, his physical body was not only the body of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, but also the body of the Ultimate Ancient Demon of the Extreme Dao.

Each wisp of particles contains the power of the ultimate rules of the Extreme Path, and a casual slap is comparable to the power of the Extreme Ultimate Arcane, if you cast the Extreme Ultimate Arcane again, it is equivalent to bursting out the power of the whole body, which can be called an unimaginable degree.

"With my current strength, I should be able to easily bombard the weaker Ultimate Ancient Demon!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he replaced all of his replica bodies with the ultimate ancient demon body.

At this moment, he is finally not afraid of anything in this era, and he can also understand the real secrets of this era.

......

The Abyss of Arromu.

Ye Tian came to visit several Ultimate Ancient Demons in the Abyss of Arrow Mother this time, and when he showed the aura of Ultimate Ancient Demons, those Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main department of Arrow Mother were shocked one by one.

"Congratulations to the Heavenly Ancient Demon for breaking through the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm!"

The Ancient Demon of Stygian was the first to congratulate.

"Congratulations!"

"Congratulations!"

They didn't expect Ye Tian to break through to become the ultimate ancient demon without a sound, and it must have broken through on the endless time and space line, otherwise they wouldn't be unable to perceive it.

And they also admired Ye Tian's courage, in the absence of the space-time Ancient Demon Pillar, cultivating for such a short time, he directly went to the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm.

Among the other peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses who dared to impact the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm, which one of them had not been immersed in countless years of cultivation, so he gave it a try.

And Ye Tian's cultivation time is not as good as a fraction of others, and his courage is really too big.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian communicated with several peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses in the Abyss of Arrow, and had a little understanding of the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm, before he left.

After Ye Tian left, these Ultimate Ancient Demons chatted again.

"Aromu Ancient Demon, what do you think of the strength of this Heavenly Ancient Demon?"

Aloye Gumo asked.

The Ancient Demon of Aromu said solemnly: "Although he didn't fight, he gave me the feeling that he was very dangerous. "

"What, to make the Aromu Ancient Demon feel dangerous to you?"

The Immortal Ancient Demon was shocked.

"Yes!" Aromu Gu Mo nodded, "His strength should be more terrifying than we imagined, but what kind of strength it is can only be known after the battle." In short, this person is not to be offended. "

"Yes!"

Several Ultimate Ancient Demons answered. []

......

Eagle Ministry.

Ye Tian revealed his ultimate ancient demon's 927 cultivation, which made the Eagle Department boil.

And many peak ancient demons in the outside world soon knew about Ye Tian's breakthrough, and they were dumbfounded.

Tribe of Dragons.

Proz sighed with emotion: "Who would have thought that the little guy at the beginning would become the ultimate ancient demon so quickly!"

And the other side.

The Golden Exterminating Ancient Demon of the Golden God Department shuddered when he learned that Ye Tian had broken through to the ultimate Ancient Demon.

If Ye Tian wanted to kill, Luo Mu's main department would not stand up for him.

Emotions such as panic and uneasiness overshadowed his will, making it impossible for him to cultivate with peace of mind.

However, at this moment, Ye Tian was preparing to transform that space-time bubble, turn it into the territory of the Eagle Ministry, and then transfer the Eagle Department to the past.

......

In an ownerless space-time bubble in the depths of endless space-time.

A replica body of Ye Tian is transforming this place, using his Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules to transform this place into a place suitable for the cultivation of the Eagle Division.

Over time, the place was gradually renovated and many resources were born.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian sent batches of Eagle tribesmen here and let them build their homes here.

After a long time, the Eagle Department has all been transferred to this space-time bubble, as long as he is not exposed, the other ultimate ancient demons will still not be able to find the space-time bubble where the Eagle Department is located in a short period of time.
